calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-14-2010 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-30-2010 Continued To Sep-27-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Aug-10-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Rod O. Divelbiss, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Leticia M. Luna, an individual, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants The Third Half LLC, a California limited liability company, or Kathryn E. May.
Defaults were entered against defendants on April 5, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on July 27, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Leticia M. Luna, an individual, and against the Defaulted Defendants The Third Half LLC, a California limited liability company, and Kathryn E. May as follows:

Damages/Principal - $87,750.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $7,548.90.
Attorney Fees - $27,696.92.
Costs - $1,535.75, for a total judgment in the amount of $124,531.57.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-02-2010 Set For Order To Show Cause On Aug-16-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
